data.content: Shipment review approved. HEAD and origin/main are both 8157f20dfecc, CI run 23004423966 succeeded for that SHA, and knot commit tags cover b52aa63bcec4, 3d8593f7b3f1, 99412107791d, and 8157f20dfecc. README/docs, scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh, and the current shipped tests no longer reference prompt guidance; prompt-cli.test.ts is no longer present. One untracked local file (agent-metadata-normalization.md) exists in this checkout, but tracked files match origin/main for the shipped tree.
